source_pipeline: configs/countries/us.yaml → sync_fiscaldata.py + sync_census_popest.py → raw.us_* → dbt_us_staging → dbt_us_analytics → dbt_us_marts → export_us_national.py

population.source: U.S. Census Bureau, Population Estimates Program (PEP), Vintage 2025

annual_fy_end.description: Total public debt outstanding at each fiscal-year end since 1790 (Historical Debt Outstanding). No public/intragov breakout in this dataset.

month_end.description: Total public debt outstanding at the last business day of each month since 1993-04 (Debt to the Penny, downsampled from daily).

notes: The annual (Historical Debt Outstanding) and daily-based (Debt to the Penny) series treat Federal Financing Bank debt differently per the datasets' published notes — do not splice them into a single continuous line.
